data.title: Caleres Snaps Up Luxury Footwear Brand Stuart Weitzman For $105 Million: Details
data.description: Caleres acquires Stuart Weitzman from Tapestry for $105 million, strengthening its position in women's fashion footwear. Deal to close in summer 2025.

data.title: Apple Unveils iPhone 16e With A18 Chip, AI Features, $599 Price Tag
data.description: Apple announces affordable iPhone 16e to replace third-generation iPhone SE with improved specs and features, priced starting $599.

data.title: Walmart Q4 Earnings Preview: Revenue Beat Streak On The Line, Expert Advises Long-Term Holders To 'Enjoy The Ride'
data.description: Walmart has beaten analyst estimates for revenue in more than 10 straight quarters. Is another beat on the table?

data.title: Appian Q4 Earnings: AI-Driven Efficiency Boosts Revenue, Subscription Growth, Issues Strong Outlook
data.description: Appian Corp (APPN) reported strong Q4 2024 revenue growth of 15% YoY, beating analyst estimates. EPS beat and stock price climbed. Positive outlook.

data.title: Why Is Jet.AI Stock Skyrocketing Today?
data.description: Jet.AI is focusing on the growing demand for AI infrastructure with a 50-megawatt project in Nevada. Headquartered in Las Vegas, the company plans to expand its capacity.
